content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1576: Establish the world Translator: Sigma_ Editor: Hitesh_

The Cloud Mist Territory was located deep inside a sea of clouds.

The Grace Mainland that came from the Desolate Territory hovered inside the thick clouds as bands of smokes and mists twirled around the planet like ribbons. Heaven and Earth energy moved like dragons in every corner of the continent.

The warriors from Desolate Territory like Yang Tian Emperor, Shi Jian, Long Zhu, Carthew, and many other characters from different forces stayed here to cultivate their bodies and soul, comprehending power Upanishads and improving their God power Ancient Tree to reach the higher realms.

Many of them had their realms broken through quickly. As they had access to abundant Heaven and Earth energy here, their progress was steadily fast.

Today, three tunnels made of space ripples got through the territory from unknown areas, all appearing above the Grace Mainland.

The three tunnels pierced through the territory entrance, falling like a galaxy. Many warriors on the Grace Mainland were startled, floating up and gathering by the entrance of the three tunnels.

Shortly after, silhouettes began to fly out of the tunnels. Emperor Sea Shark, Ming Hao, Xuan He, Audrey, Azure Dragon, DeCarlos, and Frederick brought their warriors home. They all smiled, talking cheerily and loudly from the three tunnels.

The three tunnels were connected to the territories of the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan respectively. Representing the forces in the Cloud Mist Territory, they had obtained a major harvest from the headquarters of the three great clans, which were the cultivating materials the three clans had collected and accumulated over tens of thousands of years.

“We don’t need to worry about cultivating materials even after ten thousand years. Let alone our Grace Mainland, even if we had warriors from ten Grace Mainlands, we’re sure we could satisfy their needs of cultivation resources.” Ming Hao’s cold face wore a sincere smile.

Under the furious attacks of Han Tian, Hiro, and Montecie, the Black Demon and Ancient Monster Clan’s ancestral lands had fallen. Experts of the Mysterious Sky Clan, White Bone Clan, Phantom Clan, and the Grace Mainland had swarmed toward them like hungry wolves, plundering all properties and precious assets.

From now on, the warriors on the Grace Mainland didn’t need to worry about their pellets, tools, armors, books of power Upanishads, and other cultivation aids. There were no doubts that they could reach high realms eventually.

A large amount of cultivation materials were transported through the three tunnels from the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan. The warriors on the Grace Mainland were so excited when they found out about the spoils they obtained, and everybody soon became busy.

“Bring them all to the Endless Sea. We will arrange later. Everyone will get their share. Even your later generations will have the best cultivation materials. I’m sure we can use them for the next ten thousand years!” Ming Hao screamed. Under his arrangement, the cultivation materials from the three clans were stacked up like mountains. The experts then levitated them and transported them to the Endless Sea.

At the same time, things happened the same in the Mysterious Sky Clan, White Bone Clan, and Phantom Clan.

Through the space tunnels, the White Bone Clan, Mysterious Sky Clan, and Phantom Clan had also attained a great harvest. They gathered the spoils they obtained and transported them to their territories.

The Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan’s properties were cleared, and the guards in their headquarters were all killed. When Serene Prison and Rupert came home, what awaited them would be the three large ruins.

...

Staying hidden in a world between the Phantom Clan and White Bone Clan was a mysterious territory entrance which led to Cloud Mist Territory.

At this moment, Shi Yan was sitting cross-legged in that empty void. Starlight bloomed and sprinkled from his body. The Skyfall Star River was activated shortly as it moved and overflowed like a stream of starlight, heading to a deep place.

Pieces of free asteroids and broken planets around him were attracted by his Star power Upanishad, gathering from far away.

Gradually, the empty area was packed with asteroids that slowly piled upon each other. Pairs of giant hands made of stars twisted and squeezed them, creating a massive planet.

This planet had the broken pieces of asteroids and planets as the foundation. At first, it was tiny, but the continent began to enlarge as Shi Yan poured more energy.

After an unknown time, along with his uncontrollably increasing energy, that planet was now ten times bigger than the Grace Mainland, and it was more colossal than the Dragon Lizard Star.

The massive continent hovered in the void, gradually transforming into a magical land like the ancestral land of the Phantom Clan or the White Bone Clan. Heaven and Earth energy gathered, becoming as thick as a fog that never dispersed.

Time flew by, and finally, the new continent had been established. Receiving his message, a group of experts living on the Grace Mainland like Emperor Sea Shark, Xuan He, and Ming Hao flew toward him from the secret entrance.

They began to build cities and palaces on this new planet, plant spirit herbs, arrange formations, dig up channels to guide the outer space flood to make seas and rivers. They even piled up the rocks to create high mountains and urged the Wood power Upanishad to grow forests...

Slowly, the new continent grew vigorously, now having mountains, rivers, lakes, and murmuring energy. It even had jungles and volcanoes, all things suitable for the warriors to live and cultivate in.

The new continent had become a magical land which could be compared to the ancestral lands of the Phantom Clan, White Bone Clan, and Mysterious Sky Clan in the Sea Domain of Nihility. It gathered many experts of the Grace Mainland who stayed there to survive and cultivate, gathering energy from outer space to expand the land further, making it formidable.

The low-realm warriors at Original God Realm, King God Realm, or lower realms stayed on the Grace Mainland in the Cloud Mist Territory. They continued to cultivate and advance their power in that closed but safe environment.

The new continent was situated in the Sea Domain of Nihility, right at the entrance to Cloud Mist Territory. At the same time, the Cloud Mist Territory was an independent territory, which was sealed and pretty safe.

In a corner of the new continent, which was considered a forbidden place, was a strange desert with yellow, flying sand. It was quiet and burning hot. Deep in the desert was a vacuum where a majestic man was sitting.

He had been sitting there for so many years.

One day, the Territory Ancestors, including Montecie, Mei Ji, Hiro, Han Tian, Judy, Forefather Dragon Lizard, and Dracula appeared in the sky. They observed the new land, their eyes radiating strange lights.

Thirty years ago, this place was just an empty space with rare rocks and broken planets. It used to be isolated and cold. But after thirty years, a planet had emerged with thick Heaven and Earth energy, mountains and rivers. Everything was growing lushly; many cities were built where warriors lived and cultivated.

It had become a magical land like the Empty Land. Someone had created it from nothing by squeezing asteroids and planets together.

“Get down there,” Hiro looked at that area deep inside the desert. The others nodded, then turned into jets of light, zooming toward that area.

In the control center of this new continent, Ming Hao, who was at the Territory Ancestor Realm, suddenly frowned. He turned into a shadow, walking out of the fortress and hovering in the void of the planet.

“Experts from the White Bone Clan, the Phantom Clan, and Mysterious Sky Clan...” Emperor Sea Shark’s voice came from another city. “Dismiss the light protection. They have come to find Shi Yan.”

Ming Hao nodded in response.

An invisible cage that protected the entire planet vanished slowly. The planet looked like an egg that had its shell peeled off as the outermost protection was dismissed.

Han Tian slowly nodded. “They’re doing great! They’ve done a lot of excellent work with so many Heaven and Earth treasures from the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan. This protection formation isn’t weaker than the one the Soul Clan used to have.”

“The Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan have declined, and they’re rising. They’re now the strongest force in this vast sea of stars.” Hiro watched the cities underneath and felt the intimidating auras inside as he said, “After several hundred years, they will be as strong as our three clans. With Shi Yan and that woman, nothing is impossible for them.”

Thirty years later, Montecie hadn’t been able to reverse time to appear in her little girl body. The wounds she had to bear from the previous battle weren’t recovered fully. She squinted, observing the still figure in the desert while feeling complicated.

While talking, they landed like meteors or rainbows at the center of the desert, gathering by Shi Yan.

Shi Yan was sitting motionlessly in the vacuum area. He was right in front of them, but Han Tian, Hiro, and Montecie couldn’t feel his soul signals. It was as if he wasn’t there. The strange feeling shook them as they knew that his realm had advanced further.

“Cough! Cough!”

Hiro looked at him and coughed, his eyes yearning.

Everybody scrutinized him, waiting for him to wake up. No one made any noise.

A long time later, that vacuum area slowly disappeared. Yellow sand flew everywhere, covering his body. At this moment, he opened his eyes, which looked misty and puzzled. After a while, his eyes regained focus; it seemed he had traveled through times and space, so he couldn’t locate himself yet.

They didn’t talk much, just watched and waited for him.

After fifteen minutes, he regained his sound mind, his eyes turning deep and bright as he smiled, “You’ve come early.”

After saying that, he touched his forehead, causing two dazzling Absolute Beginning symbols to fly out. The two Absolute Beginning symbols had thick Time and Metal auras. “I promised you to refine an Absolute Beginning Original Symbol. Here you are. Take them.”

The Time Original Symbol turned into a jet of light, entering Montecie’s eyes.

Montecie’s mesmerizing appearance slowly changed as the time reversed. She got shorter, her cascading hair shrank into her head, and her ample bosom turned smaller...

After dozens of seconds, Montecie had returned to her twelve-year-old little girl appearance. At the same time, her attainment in power Upanishad had increased.

Hiro with the Metal Original Symbol was like a sharp sword that could break the sky, carrying an invincible aura with his keen power. He was so thrilled that he could say nothing but ‘Thank you!’
